══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Duergar — Iron Concentration HP: 46/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Duergar — Iron Concentration HP: 34/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Duergar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Duergar — Iron Concentration --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
